excerpt: Each name represents a facet of divine governance and manifestation...in the Fatimid philosophical corpus, the comprehension of these names became integrated with the science of esoteric exegesis (taʾwīl)
source_location_hint: doctrine of divine attributes and taʾwīl

excerpt: In the esoteric teachings transmitted through the daʿwa, the dāʿīs and the Imāms have understood that each name encodes a layer of spiritual meaning
source_location_hint: exposition of divine names in esoteric context

excerpt: The ninety-nine names, when properly understood through taʾwīl, constitute a unified testimony to divine transcendence and a ladder by which the human intellect ascends toward knowledge of ultimate reality
source_location_hint: integration of divine names with metaphysical knowledge
